// :any
(type any)
// :any
(empty any)
// :string
"Hello World"
// :stringlist
(stringlist
 "Hello"
 "World")
// :stringmap
(stringmap
 :a "1"
 :b "2")
// :anylist
(anylist
 "Hello"
 "World")
// :var
(var
 :name "myvar"
 :type string)
// :func
(func
 :type boolean<-booleann
 :return boolean
 :varlist
  (varlist
   (var
    :name "booleann"
    :type booleann))
 :value
  (anylist
   (var-declare
    :var
     (var
      :name "output"
      :type boolean
      :mutable true))
   (if
    :return-type boolean
    :thenelselist
     (thenelselist
      (thenelse
       :code ":then"
       :if
        (var
         :name "booleann"
         :type booleann)
       :then
        (var-set
         :var
          (var
           :name "output"
           :type boolean
           :mutable true)
         :value true))))))
// :func-declare
(func-declare
 :type boolean<-booleann
 :prefix "v_")
